---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact details for the Cellular Immunology and Vaccinology Lab at UNSW Sydney."
---

# Contact

## Cellular Immunology and Vaccinology Lab

**School of Biomedical Sciences**  
**UNSW RNA Institute**  
UNSW Sydney

**Lab head:** Dr Daniel Fernández-Ruiz  
**Email:** [danielfr@unsw.edu.au](mailto:danielfr@unsw.edu.au)

**Location:**  
School of Biomedical Sciences  
Wallace Wurth Building   
UNSW Sydney    
Australia

## Links

- [UNSW group page](https://www.unsw.edu.au/medicine-health/our-schools/biomedical-sciences/research-and-impact/research-themes/research-groups/fernandez-ruiz-group)
